nodes.label: Main ingestion script for processing markdown documents into vector DB and knowl
Pipeline for ingesting documents into vector DB and knowledge graph.
Initialize ingestion pipeline.          Args:             config: Ingestion conf
Ingest all documents from the documents folder.          Args:             progr
Ingest a single document.          Args:             file_path: Path to the docu
Find all supported document files in the documents folder.
Read document content from file - supports multiple formats via Docling.
Transcribe audio file using Whisper ASR via Docling.
Extract title from document content or filename.
Save document and chunks to PostgreSQL.
